title: Nippon Paint Store Holdings Services is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Nippon Paint Store Holdings Services is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Nippon Paint Store Holdings Services is actively seeking a talented and motivated Floor Manager to join our dynamic team in Ludhiana. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Nippon Paint Store Holdings Services:
Nippon Paint Store Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in SAP Retail

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nippon Paint Store Holdings Services!
